title: [MTR4] London Underground C69/C77 Stock
description: Resource pack that adds London Underground C69/C77 Stock into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
_A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway._

# Overview
The London Underground C69/C77 stock, aka C-stocks, are sub-surface train produced by Metro-Cammell. The first batch of 212 cars was produced in 1969 to replace older O and P stocks for Circle and Hammersmith & City Lines. The second batch of 66 cars was produced in 1977 to replace the CO/CP stock on the District Line. These trains run on District, Circle and Hammersmith & City lines for most of their lifespan. These trains were refurbished between 1991 and 1994 to give them a modern look, and were subsequently retired and scrapped between 2012 and 2014, replaced by the S7 stock.

This resource pack is to add the London Underground C69/C77 stock into Minecraft with Minecraft Transit Railway mod, made by Navi_LX9702 in 2026.

# Disclaimer

This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Transport for London, and its predecessor, London Transport.
